name: mem
description: Local-first Rust memory service for multi-agent workflows. Provides MCP tools (memory_ingest/search/...) and Codex hooks that mine transcripts and inject wake-up context.

interface.shortDescription: Shared memory for multi-agent workflows (MCP + transcript mining + wake-up).
interface.longDescription: Local-first Rust service that stores agent memories in DuckDB with HNSW vector search, life-cycle metadata (status / supersedes / feedback / decay), and a token-budgeted retrieval pipeline. Codex hooks mine session transcripts in the background and inject relevant memories at session start.
defaultPrompt: Search shared memory for prior decisions on this topic
Save this fix as a memory tagged with the affected module
Inject relevant past context for the current session
